mapper.select: select id, name, name_cn as nameCn from bangumi_subject where type = #{type} and (name_cn like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) order by case when name_cn like concat(#{keyword}, '%') then 0 when name like concat(#{keyword}, '%') then 1 when name_cn like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') then 2 else 3 end, `rank` is null, `rank` asc limit #{limit}

select r.subject_id as subjectId, r.relation_type as relationType, r.`order`, s.id, s.type, s.name, s.name_cn as nameCn, s.infobox, s.platform, s.summary, s.nsfw, s.tags, s.meta_tags as metaTags, s.score, s.score_details as scoreDetails, s.`rank`, s.date, s.favorite, s.series, s.images from bangumi_subject_relation r join bangumi_subject s on r.related_subject_id = s.id where r.subject_id = #{subjectId} and s.type = #{type} order by r.`order`, r.related_subject_id
